integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/self_improve/scheduler.rs:149-204 real rolling-window cap + deterministic skip-reason priority (operator>goodhart>pending>budget); inline+integration tests prove 25/24h cap and true sliding window. CONCERN: scheduler doc (scheduler.rs:147-148) says it is the 'only caller of LoopCore::run_one_iteration' yet run_one_iteration has zero non-test callers in src/ — the scheduler is orphaned, and FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP is only returned as a struct, never emitted to a real EventLedger.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V3 built the contract's actual surface end-to-end: src/atelier/visual_steer_feedback.rs:85-178 record_visual_steer_feedback validates the MT-046 loop, converts each over-threshold evidence artifact into a durable PG row (migration 0129, upsert keyed loop_id+evidence_id) with concrete numbers+refs next_action, VISUAL_STEER_FEEDBACK_RECORDED in same tx. Proof tests/atelier_visual_steer_feedback_tests.rs: breach -> 1 row with actionable next_action ('300 bps'/'250 bps'/diff refs), PG re-read, ledger 1 then 2 on idempotent re-record; within-threshold records nothing; invalid loop rejected with nothing persisted.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Out-of-contract observation: self_improve scheduler LoopCore::run_one_iteration has zero non-test callers and FR_EVT_DISTILL_LOOP_CAP is struct-returned, never ledger-emitted - that module carries colliding self-improve cluster MT numbering, not this WP's MT-156 contract surface. Follow-on item.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-156 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] STEER Feedback From Visual Mismatch -- Convert visual threshold breaches into actionable STEER feedback records (not silent failure or generic prose).
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for STEER Feedback From Visual Mismatch
